title: Herr Lehmanns Weltreise - auf 4 Rädern um den Globus
overview: Dresden filmmaker Martin Zech, his wife Katherine, and their bus, "Herr Lehmann," spent two years traveling the world. With 69 horsepower, they conquered the worst, the most beautiful, and the most interesting roads around the globe, recounting their journey through America, Asia, and back to Europe.
